title: Create a timeline based on quoted hours
excerpt: I’m looking to use Monday to improve the way my company tracks projects.  All our projects are quoted in Hours, and I would like to be able to create a timeline based on the start date and the quoted number of hours (wit…

posts.author: Coryg57 (Cory Grunwald)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking to use Monday to improve the way my company tracks projects. All our projects are quoted in Hours, and I would like to be able to create a timeline based on the start date and the quoted number of hours (with 8 hours per day). Is there a way to set this up?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Coryg57

What column type are you using to quote/specify the hours? A couple of work arounds come to mind but it would be helpful to understand your requirement in a little more detail.

I have a few ideas on getting around that depending on your complete requirement.
Feel free to drop me an email with more detail (a screenshot would be great) or better yet book an informal chat with me here if you’d like to.

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream
